name: Golden Hit
author: Poki
description: Golden Hit is a multiplayer gold-digging adventure. You get to explore shiny treasure-filled farms and let your pickaxe do the digging! Just stand on a gold pile, watch the loot fly, collect powerful pets from eggs, and merge them for even more power. Upgrade your pickaxe, customize your character with cool skins, and use the Rebirth system to supercharge your progress. Ready to dig your way to the top? How to play Golden Hit? Use WASD, the arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Golden Hit? Golden Hit is created by Stishka. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Golden Hit for free? You can play Golden Hit for free on Poki. Can I play Golden Hit on mobile devices and desktop? Golden Hit can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
